title: Nia's Colorful Feelings
synopsis: Little Nia experiences different emotions throughout her day, each one bringing beautiful colors that swirl around her. From happy yellow sunshine to sad blue rain, she learns that all feelings are okay and they come in wonderful colors.

pages.text: This is Nia. She feels many things today.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes stands in a rainbow swirl of colors representing all emotions
illustration.alt: Nia surrounded by colorful emotion swirls

pages.text: When Nia is happy, she feels bright yellow sunshine all around her.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes laughing joyfully surrounded by bright yellow sunshine rays and golden swirls
illustration.alt: Happy Nia with yellow sunshine colors

pages.text: When Nia is sad, gentle blue raindrops fall softly around her.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes with a small frown as soft blue rain and gentle blue swirls surround her
illustration.alt: Sad Nia with blue rain colors

pages.text: When Nia is angry, she sees swirling red all around her.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes with crossed arms surrounded by swirling red spirals and angry red patterns
illustration.alt: Angry Nia with red swirl colors

pages.text: When Nia is calm, soft green flows like gentle waves around her.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes sitting peacefully with soft green waves and calming green patterns flowing around her
illustration.alt: Calm Nia with green wave colors

pages.text: All of Nia's feelings are good. All colors are beautiful. Nia loves her colorful feelings.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes smiling widely with all colors - yellow, blue, red, and green - swirling together in harmony around her
illustration.alt: Nia celebrating all her colorful emotions together

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color does Nia see when she is happy?
questions.explanation: When Nia is happy, she feels bright yellow sunshine all around her.

questions.question: What falls around Nia when she is sad?
questions.explanation: When Nia is sad, gentle blue raindrops fall softly around her.

questions.question: Are all of Nia's feelings good?
questions.explanation: All of Nia's feelings are good, and all colors are beautiful.
